SEARCH
Package com.mycompany.model

Class Component

java.lang.Object
com.mycompany.model.CircuitElement
com.mycompany.model.Component
Direct Known Subclasses:
Capacitor, Inductor, Resistor
public abstract class Component extends CircuitElement
Abstract base class for primitive components (Resistor, Capacitor, Inductor). Holds the numeric value common to all primitive components and provides a getter for that value. Concrete subclasses implement impedance calculation and description.
Version:
1.2
Author:
Kamil Fulneczek

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final double
    value
    Numeric parameter of the component: - resistor: resistance in Ohms - capacitor: capacitance in Farads - inductor: inductance in Henrys Protected so subclasses can access it.
